items.title: Projects to Make the World Better Promoted at Merced 2 Market
items.summary: By Patty Guerra, UC Merced May 27, 2026 The event highlighted projects aimed at helping people and communities solve problems. An artificial intelligence-powered system to ensure the safety of the elderly while still providing privacy. Wearable muscle monitoring to speed recovery from injury. A chemical-free method of putting out fires. A more effective way to detect methane leaks. These were just
